name: Mexican Sweet Potato Hash
method: Boil water in a pot, and add sweet potatoes to it. Boil till the point
potatoes are tender. Then drain them and set aside.
Take a skillet and heat the oil over the medium heat. Add onion, red
and green bell pepper in it. Saute it for almost 5 minutes
Add sweet potatoes and garlic. Saute for almost 4 minutes.
Add chorizo, and cook for almost 5 minutes.
Put the flame low and add eggs on the top of potato hash.
Cover it, and cook for 5 minutes
